name: starify-links
description: Add Stars badges to all kinds of links

scripts.test: bun run build && bunx playwright test
scripts.test:unit: bun run build && bunx playwright test --project=unit
scripts.test:e2e: bun run build && bunx playwright test --project=e2e
scripts.test:ui: bun run build && bunx playwright test --ui
scripts.test:debug: bun run build && bunx playwright test --debug

author: itenium
